calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Lois Jones, CSR 3689.
Atty. Eric Shiu, Esq. for Plaintiff: CNET NETWORKS INC, with witness JOHN DONOVAN who was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff CNET NETWORKS INC. and against the Defaulted Defendant: RAM DISTIBUTION, LLC. as follows:
Damages $448,511.49
Prejudgment Interest $55,458.93
Attorney's Fees $1,000
Costs, $ 620.00 for a total Judgment of $505,590.42
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Continued To Apr-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
